name: michael tarvin
body: Thank you for sharing from your heart! Prayers for Lyla, the doctors and you and Kayla, as this scan takes place today. May God's wisdom be with the doctors and you both as parents. Continuing to pray for healing for Lyla, especially re the fluid and the focal seizures. Sending love ❤️ amy & mike

name: Nancy Rapaszky
body: Praying you find answers and resolution today in the scheduled cat scan. Lyla is first on my prayer list.

name: Judy Nichols
body: Such a testimony of God's grace as you share in the very real sufferings of Christ.

name: Kathy Laub
body: Thank you SO MUCH for all your writing. Keeping us updated AND blessed. "God, we know that YOU are our home, but thank you for this house." OH my. And that song. We are commanded to encourage each other and you are doing that in the midst of this trying season that you are in. ❤️🙏
